name: Low Cal Graham Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ingredients in a 9 inch pie tin and mix well with a fork.
2. Press crumbs evenly around the edges and on the bottom of the pie tin.
3. Bake at 350°F for 6 minutes.
4. Cool and fill as desired.
5. Cut into 8 even portions.
Nutritive value for 1 portion (1/8 of recipe):
CAL: 78
CHO: 8 gm
PRO: 1 gm
FAT: 5 gm
Na: 100 mg
Food exchanges per serving: 1/2 bread, 1 fat
Low sodium diets: Use salt-free margarine
Source: The New Diabetic Cookbook
